utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Hey ! How long until Pete fight ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh , about five minutes . Right now they are interviewing his opponent . Apparently he trains by going to Iran and pulling the arms off thieves .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Four , please . I am really nervous . Thank you .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: So Ross , how umm , how did it go with Bonnie ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I gotta tell you , I ... I was not expecting to like her at all , I mean I actually was not expecting to like anyone right now , but she is really terrific .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: No , I ... I am saying I liked her .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yeah , you know what , there are other fish in the sea .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Pheebs , I think she is great . Okay ? We are going out again .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Okay , I hear you ! Are you capable of talking about any thing else ?

emotion_cause.span: 11_Are you capable of talking about any thing else ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Hey ! Which one my turkey burger ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Ahh , the one next to my foot . Sorry .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Okay , we will be right in . So ah , did your boss try to slap you again today ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Okay , I had to put on lotion !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: But , it is gonna be okay , because as of tomorrow I am conducting an experiment , and if all goes as planned , my butt will be smack free .
